videoSnippet.title: Lowest Seed Crushes SuperGM's || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Madaminov, Mukhiddin (2523) - Vokhidov, Shamsiddin (2550)
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [10] 2026.06.15
B40 Sicilian defence

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 e6 3.c3 Nf6 4.e5 Nd5 5.d4 cxd4 6.cxd4 d6 7.Bc4 Be7 8.O-O O-O 9.Qe2 a6 10.Re1 b5 11.Bd3 Nd7 12.Qe4 f5 13.Qe2 dxe5 14.dxe5 Bb7 15.Nc3 Nc5 16.Nxd5 Bxd5 17.Bc2 Bc4 18.Qe3 Nd3 19.Rd1 Bc5 20.Rxd3 Bxe3 21.Rxd8 Bxf2+ 22.Kxf2 Rfxd8 23.Be3 Rac8 24.b4 Bd3 25.Bb3 Bc4 26.Bc5 a5 27.Bb6 Rd3 28.bxa5 f4 29.a6 Ra8 30.a7 h6 31.Bc2 Ra3 32.Be4 R8xa7 33.Bxa7 Rxa7 34.Nd4 b4 35.Nc6 Ra4 36.h4 Kf8 37.h5 b3 38.a3 Bb5 39.Nb4 Ra5 40.Bd3 b2 41.Rb1 Bd7 42.Rxb2 Rxa3 43.Be2 Ra5 44.Nd3 Rd5 45.Nxf4
